metarubrics.name: Detector dimensions retrieval
metarubrics.description: Did the model identify that the {layer} has radius {radius:.3f} m?

metarubrics.name: Per-event mass listing
metarubrics.description: Did the model list the invariant masses of the parent particle in INTERMEDIATE RESULTS PER EVENT section?

metarubrics.name: Per-event invariant mass reconstruction
metarubrics.description: Did the model reconstruct invariant mass of a parent particle in event {event_id} as {mass:.2f} GeV or value in range [{mass_min:.2f}, {mass_max:.2f}] GeV?

metarubrics.name: Final result existence - mass
metarubrics.description: Did the model state the mass of the unknown particle in the FINAL RESULTS section?

metarubrics.name: Particle mass M
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate the mass of new particle as {particle_mass:.2f} GeV/c², or value in range [{particle_mass_min:.2f}, {particle_mass_max:.2f}] GeV/c²?

metarubrics.name: Final result existence - decay width
metarubrics.description: Did the model state the decay width of the unknown particle in the FINAL RESULTS section?

metarubrics.name: Decay width Γ
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate the decay width of new particle as {particle_width:.2f} GeV/c², or value in range [{particle_width_min:.2f}, {particle_width_max:.2f}] GeV/c²?

metarubrics.name: Analysis summary
metarubrics.description: Did the model provide a summary of the invariant mass reconstructions in the SUMMARY section?
